---
description: 501 stat-card module ‚Äî four core fields, editor UI, and layout invariants
alwaysApply: true

# 501 feature cards ‚Äî core task requirements

This project exists to replace **three static coloured card images** on the 501
landing page with a **reusable, accessible, CMS-agnostic** module.

## The four core card elements (non-negotiable)

Every **stat-layout** card (`layout: "stat"`) is defined by exactly these
user-facing fields:

| UI label | Schema field | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Top text** | `eyebrow` | Intro line (‚ÄúMore than‚Äù, ‚ÄúFind us in‚Äù, ‚Ä¶) |
| **Middle text** | `figure.value` | Hero figure ‚Äî large typographic stat |
| **Bottom text** | `figure.label` | Completes the statement (‚Äúdelighted guests‚Äù) |
| **Icon / image** | `media.src` + `alt` | Foot illustration (decorative `alt=""` OK) |

Do not remove or rename this mapping without updating the demo editor, docs, and
tests together.

## Stat layout rendering

- Use `layout: "stat"` (or infer when eyebrow + figure, no title/description).
- DOM order: **top ‚Üí middle ‚Üí bottom ‚Üí media (foot)**.
- Colours: per-card `appearance.background` / `appearance.foreground` or
  `501-green` | `501-magenta` | `501-blue` themes.
- **Resize**: `appearance.minHeight`, `appearance.scale`.
- **Rotate**: `appearance.rotateDeg` (-180‚Ä¶180).
- **Icon size**: `appearance.mediaMaxHeight` (core panel, with icon picker).
- Advanced only: font sizes, borders, radius, font family.

## Demo card editor (`demo/editor/`)

The **501 feature cards ‚Äî live editor** section is the primary task deliverable:

- Core panel edits the four elements + icon size + colour + rotate + scale + min height.
- Advanced `<details>` holds typography and border controls.
- Output is canonical JSON (`localStorage` key `fc-card-editor-data`).
- Do not regress editor ‚Üí preview ‚Üí JSON sync.

## Standard vs stat layouts

| Layout | Use when |
| --- | --- |
| `stat` | 501 landing-page coloured stat cards (brief default) |
| `standard` | Title-led marketing cards with description + CTA |

Standard layout still requires `title`. Stat layout requires `figure.value` +
`figure.label` (or explicit `title` fallback).

## Documentation sync

When changing stat cards or editor behaviour, update:

- `docs/SCHEMA.md` (field mapping)
- `docs/DEMO.md` (editor section)
- `README.md` (task / quick start if user-facing)
- This rule file

## Out of scope for core task

- Demo page parody themes (`--page-*`) ‚Äî chrome only, not the module API.
- Framework wrappers ‚Äî optional; core remains vanilla Web Component.
